title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: Tel Aviv, Israel / New York (Global, hybrid)
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ and trusted by brands like The New York Times, Wiz, and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale its GTM operational backbone. Reporting to the CRO, this hands-on leadership role requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech expertise aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, Head of RevOps role matches target, and Tel Aviv/hybrid location is ideal. Only minor gap: no explicit $30M+ ARR scaling confirmation in profile, but seniority level suggests this.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed your deep B2B SaaS and fintech background—Finout is solving a massive pain point for companies drowning in cloud costs, and they're building the RevOps function to match their $85M+ backing and scale. With your 15+ years orchestrating GTM operations across high-growth environments, you'd be the exact operator they need reporting to the CRO to build their operational backbone.

title: Head of AI & Revenue Operations
description: Noibu, a growing B2B SaaS company, is hiring a senior, hands-on Revenue Operations leader to own systems, analytics, and automation end to end. This founding-level IC role reports directly to the CEO and requires 5+ years of RevOps experience in B2B SaaS with 2-3 years as a hands-on Salesforce admin. Candidates should be AI-native (Claude, Cursor, Clay), Salesforce Administrator certified, and skilled in GTM stack administration, automation projects, and dashboard building.
score_reason: Exceptional match on RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, Salesforce/HubSpot proficiency, and AI-native GTM skills. Founding-level IC role with CEO reporting line aligns perfectly with senior executive trajectory; remote location removes any friction.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Noibu's Head of AI & Revenue Operations opening and thought of you immediately—this founding-level role combining RevOps infrastructure with AI-native tools (Claude, Cursor, Clay) feels built for someone with your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM and hands-on Salesforce expertise. The chance to own systems, analytics, and automation end-to-end while reporting directly to the CEO is exactly the kind of strategic IC position that leverages deep operational knowledge. Would be worth a quick conversation to explore if the timing works.

title: RevOps Manager

Your focus on AI-native GTM and owning the technical RevOps stack aligns with how I've approached systems thinking at [previous company], and I'd bring that same builder mentality to your revenue engine.
